description_long: This is a two-seater outdoor sofa with a woven rattan or wicker texture, featuring a light tan color throughout. The sofa has a continuous, slightly curved backrest and armrests that are integrated into the main frame, giving it a seamless and modern appearance. The seat and back surfaces display a diamond-patterned weave, adding both visual interest and tactile texture. The legs are simple, straight, and dark-colored, contrasting with the lighter body and positioned at the corners for stability. The overall design suggests durability and weather resistance, making it suitable for parks, patios, or urban public spaces. The sofa's proportions and materials indicate comfort for sitting, with a sturdy yet inviting look.
description: A light tan, woven rattan-style two-seater sofa with integrated curved backrest and armrests, featuring a diamond-patterned texture and dark, straight legs. Designed for outdoor or urban use, it combines durability with a modern, seamless appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the continuous, diamond-patterned woven backrest and two dark, straight legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's armrest profile, the thickness of the seat, and the woven texture wrapping around the side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the open seating area, integrated armrests, and the full extent of the diamond-patterned weave on the seat and backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest, seat depth, and woven texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions are visually integrated and attached, with a uniform thickness and no visible separation.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, integrated into the sofa's frame, medium height relative to the seat, with a straight, slightly curved profile and no additional padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four straight, block-style legs positioned at the corners, dark in color, with a simple, exposed wooden or composite appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a gentle curve, matching the seat in texture and material, and no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Diamond-patterned woven texture, consistent across the seat, backrest, and armrests, giving a quilted and tactile appearance.
